{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary
`generateZipPath()` constructs zip entry names for collected APKs using device controlled content from `extractFileName()`. Since `extractFileName()` does not reject traversal sequences, the resulting zip entry name can contain `../`. AndroidQF itself does not extract the zip it creates, but any forensic tool that extracts the acquisition bundle without zip-slip protection could write files to attacker chosen paths.

### Impact
A compromised device could inject path traversal sequences into the acquisition bundle's zip entry names. When a forensic analyst or forensic tooling extracts the bundle without entry name validation, files could be written outside the intended extraction directory.

### Patched version
[1.8.3](https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/releases/tag/v1.8.3)

### Credits
This issue was identified during a security assessment conducted by 0xche.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T17:09:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T17:09:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/security/advisories/GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52", "https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/releases/tag/v1.8.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mvt-project/androidqf/security-advisories/GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf", "summary": "androidqf: Zip entry Name Injection in APK bundle (Zip Slip for zip consumers)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T17:09:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf2q-463c-6f52", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/mvt-project/androidqf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.8.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: androidqf: Zip entry Name Injection in APK bundle (Zip Slip for zip consumers)
